overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a dystopian urban environment. The player character moves from an open plaza beneath an elevated highway, crosses a street intersection, and enters a narrow neon-lit alleyway with wet reflective pavement and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza beneath elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass toward the illuminated building ahead

entered.detail: elevated highway overhead with visible support beams and dark underside
large orange-lit structural columns supporting the overpass
modern building facade with warm orange accent lighting around the entrance
tall vertical screens displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene opens beneath a massive highway overpass in a wide urban plaza. Concrete pillars line the left side while digital billboards glow on the right. The camera moves forward toward an orange-lit building entrance in the distance, with sparse pedestrians visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into the open street intersection
passing close to pedestrians while walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk past other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in leather jacket with American flag patch walking past the camera
dark sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall modern street light illuminating the intersection
modern building with reflective glass windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into an open street intersection, crossing yellow-striped crosswalks. The environment shifts to exposed night sky with mixed street lighting. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions on the sidewalk, and a dark sedan drives past on the right as the camera turns to follow the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with holographic advertisements and wet pavement

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between tall buildings with neon lighting
approaching concrete ramp structure at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the narrow alley, passing scattered pedestrians and debris

notable_agents.action: woman in pink jacket and red skirt walking ahead into the alley

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with large glowing holographic advertisements
industrial concrete wall with pipes and metal grating
large vertical digital displays showing colorful advertisements with pink and cyan hues
sloped concrete ramp with yellow-black caution stripes at the end of the alley
large industrial waste container with hazard markings
derelict car parked against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed alleyway with wet reflective pavement. Tall walls on both sides display vibrant holographic neon advertisements in pink and cyan. The camera passes a yellow dumpster and abandoned vehicle while approaching a concrete ramp at the alley's end. The environment is distinctly cyberpunk with industrial pipes and glowing signage illuminating the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, concrete urban plaza into a claustrophobic, neon-drenched alleyway. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, moving past concrete pillars and glowing digital billboards toward an orange-lit building entrance. As the camera emerges from the shadow of the overpass, the scene opens into a street intersection under the night sky, crossing yellow-striped crosswalks while pedestrians and a dark sedan pass by. The environment then shifts abruptly as the camera turns away from the open road and enters a narrow alleyway characterized by wet, reflective pavement and towering walls. Finally, the path is illuminated by vibrant pink and cyan holographic advertisements and industrial pipes, leading past a yellow dumpster and an abandoned vehicle toward a concrete ramp.
